Critical items on track for completion to secure Certificate of Occupancy.
However, minor weather risks could delay final outdoor work, specifically the asphalt walking path, due by Thursday.
actionItems: - **Documentation Due:** Closeout documents, including as-built drawings, are due tomorrow to ensure smooth project handover.
However, minor weather risks could delay final outdoor work, specifically the asphalt walking path, due by Thursday.
Coordination efforts are being led by Andrew Cannon to ensure timely completion of punch list items and ongoing communication with vendors and city officials as closeout documents are due tomorrow.

meetings.title: OAC- Westfield Collective
criticalRisks: The exterior work is advancing with landscaping expected to resume soon, and critical caulking has resolved previous water issues.
decisions: - **Security Adjustments:** Access and control modifications are in progress; lockable double doors being assessed; signage confirmed until April 15th event.
Adjustments to security features are underway, including lockable doors and signage confirmed until the grand opening.
actionItems: - **Lighting Issues:** Delays in bulkhead and sconce light deliveries; discrepancies in fixture assembly noted, requiring urgent supplier follow-up.
- **Documentation Preparations:** Warranty and manuals to be delivered by Friday; change orders and inspection fees ready for submission post-meeting.
Lighting delays were discussed, particularly regarding bulkhead and sconce fixtures, which require urgent supplier follow-up.

meetings.title: OAC- Westfield Collective
meetings.summary: # OAC- Westfield Collective **Date:** March 17, 2026 at 3:00 PM **ID:** 01KKJK4D9PV4J7HRANR1E5AZXA **Duration:** 0 minutes ## Attendees - acannon@alleatogroup.com,jdawson@alleatogroup.com,mewers@medellasprings.com,e@damn...
criticalRisks: # OAC- Westfield Collective **Date:** March 17, 2026 at 3:00 PM **ID:** 01KKJK4D9PV4J7HRANR1E5AZXA **Duration:** 0 minutes ## Attendees - acannon@alleatogroup.com,jdawson@alleatogroup.com,mewers@medellasprings.com,e@damngoodinteriors.com,g@damngoodinteriors.com,m@damngoodinteriors.com,tim.stuever@pourmybeer.com,fireflies@alleatogroup.com,nick@pourmybev.com,katie@ibeachvolleyball.com,bclymer@alleatogroup.com,katie@ibeach31.com,nick@pourmybeer.com,ctragesser@alleatogroup.com,gdesmit@studioaxis.com,tinman@alleatogroup.com - jdawson@alleatogroup.com - mewers@medellasprings.com - e@damngoodinteriors.com - g@damngoodinteriors.com - m@damngoodinteriors.com - tim.stuever@pourmybeer.com - fireflies@alleatogroup.com - nick@pourmybev.com - katie@ibeachvolleyball.com - bclymer@alleatogroup.com - katie@ibeach31.com - nick@pourmybeer.com - ctragesser@alleatogroup.com - gdesmit@studioaxis.com - tinman@alleatogroup.com ## Summary ### Overview - **Inventory Control Gaps:** Issues with missing materials highlighted need for stricter on-site inventory checks and personnel for accountability.
- **Lighting Component Issues:** Mismatched voltage and missing light couplers delay lighting completion; urgent resolution needed to maintain schedule.
- **Door Hardware Completion:** All doors are lockable but missing parts are pending; full functionality relies on strike plate arrival.
actionItems: ### Action Items **Eli** - Follow up with Bobby on missing table shipment details and send complaint email once data is received (04:46) - Review spec sheet for sconces and confirm wiring and product specifications; coordinate with Ty for photos to resolve fixture voltage issues (08:18) - Ensure clearer inventory and receiving processes for future shipments, including managing last mile receiving or container storage solutions (05:26) **Ty Inman** - Take photos of sconces with questionable wiring and send to Eli for evaluation (08:44) - Confirm with subcontractor boss about missing couplers and track lights and expedite delivery; verify no other missing materials onsite (11:25) - Follow up with glass contractor on crack repair and water testing results (13:08) - Perform door frame and door removal replacement tasks; address missing strike issue on door frame (12:38) **Andrew Cannon** - Notify Mike about meeting update and confirm alternate scheduling due to his absence (10:07) - Provide update to Brandon and team regarding door lockable hardware progress and missing parts delivery status (12:02) - Coordinate with Chad and Eli to develop detailed finish and fixture document for next project site (07:00) - Oversee trash dumpster swap to resolve access issues caused by furniture debris (14:20) **Chad Tragesser** - Support overseeing improved on-site receiving processes and locked cargo container management for materials storage (05:21) - Assist Andrew and Eli in finalizing coordinated documentation and confirm lighting scope changes and responsibility (06:36) - Confirm scheduling of trash dumpster swap and follow through to completion (14:20) **Brandon Clymer** - Push Ty and subcontractor to confirm and expedite delivery of missing lighting components; validate overall completeness of materials onsite (11:04) - Verify resolution of door hardware and locking issues with Andrew and Ty (12:28) - Monitor project closeout progress, ensuring all items are completed before exit (14:10) ### Keywords tables, inventory, lighting, door hardware, container storage, site progress ## Fireflies Link [View in Fireflies](https://app.fireflies.ai/view/01KKJK4D9PV4J7HRANR1E5AZXA)

input.message: What meetings did we have on the Westfield project in the last 30 days?

output.rationale: The user is asking for exact meeting records tied to a specific project and time window ('last 30 days'). This is a source/evidence retrieval request rather than a synthesized status update, so source_lookup with retrieval of recent meeting data for project 43 is the best fit.

memories.content: The user prefers detailed, specific updates on project status, risks, and next steps for Vermillion Rise Warehouse.
User prefers high-leverage, action-oriented tasks prioritized daily for Vermillion Rise Warehouse project.
User prefers to have tasks and RFIs associated with specific project names, due dates, and assignees documented clearly.
Recent meetings include offer letter creation on 2026-05-08, Exol weekly call, Uniqlo & GPC huddle, and Union Collective design review on the same date.
Verify latest post-April-22 communications and check structured budget, commitments, direct costs, and change orders before quoting exposure dollars for Westfield Collective.
Westfield Collective is engaged in active closeout and commercial coordination with ongoing discussions about LOI/warranty language, change-order signatures, and remaining work.
The latest design meeting for Vermillion Rise was on October 10, 2023, with key participants including Project Manager Sarah Thompson and Mark Chen.

provider_decision.reason: Streaming model tools enabled on the configured AI SDK provider. Vercel AI Gateway is preferred when AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY is configured; direct OpenAI requires AI_PROVIDER_PATH=openai or no gateway key. Disable by setting AI_ASSISTANT_DISABLE_STREAMING_MODEL_TOOLS=true.
